biological_context_note: Missingness itself may encode collection bias; treat as data-quality signal.
Sex/gender differences may reflect both biology and cohort sampling artifacts.
Education can represent cognitive reserve and social determinants, not direct pathology.
nWBV is a global atrophy proxy and biologically plausible in cognitive decline patterns.
Age captures broad neurodegenerative risk trends but can proxy survival and selection effects.
eTIV is structural context and not a direct disease marker in isolation.
SES links to access and life-course exposure; interpretation is confounded by social factors.
ASF is structural scaling and should be interpreted cautiously due to collinearity.
